topic: A wet handprint appears on the inside of my shower glass while I shower but I shower alone
title: A Wet Handprint Appears on the Inside of My Shower Glass While I Shower | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A wet handprint appears on the inside of my shower glass while I shower. From the other side. I shower alone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wet handprint on fogged shower glass from the inside, dim bathroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small bathroom. A glass shower door. I lock the bathroom out of habit.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small bathroom with a glass shower door, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a fogged steamy glass shower door, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning a handprint pressed through the fog. Large. On the inside, facing me.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a large handprint pressed through the fog on shower glass, facing inward, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I was the only one in there.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a single person silhouette inside a steamy glass shower, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Fingers spread wide. Dragging slowly downward.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a handprint on fogged glass with fingers dragging downward in streaks, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I wiped it and watched the glass.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand wiping a foggy shower glass clear, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A new print formed under my eyes. No hand made it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fresh handprint forming on fogged glass with no hand present, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each shower there are more, large and small, as if a family presses in from the steam.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of many overlapping handprints of different sizes on fogged shower glass, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last shower the prints came from my side of the glass. Pushing out. Toward the empty bathroom.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of handprints pressing outward from inside fogged shower glass toward an empty bathroom, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I shower at the gym now.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a row of gym shower stalls, tiled and empty, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the gym mirror fogged. A handprint formed, with a wedding ring I do not wear.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fogged gym mirror with a handprint and a faint wedding ring mark, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
